scripts.dev: fuser -k 3000/tcp || true; (cd ui && bun x vite --port 3000 --strictPort &) && bun x wait-on http://localhost:3000 && bun run dev:browser; fuser -k 3000/tcp || true
scripts.build: bun run build:ui && bun run build:cpp
scripts.build:cpp: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release .. && ninja otf-browser
scripts.test:cpp: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release .. && ninja otf-browser-native-tests otf-browser-extra-tests otf-browser-url-policy-tests otf-browser-json-bridge-tests otf-browser-tab-manager-tests otf-browser-store-tests && ctest --output-on-failure
scripts.test:e2e: bun run test:e2e:smoke && bun run test:e2e:tabs && bun run test:e2e:navigation && bun run test:e2e:settings && bun run test:e2e:history && bun run test:e2e:bookmarks && bun run test:e2e:workspaces && bun run test:e2e:downloads && bun run test:e2e:image-preview && bun run test:e2e:findbar && bun run test:e2e:security && bun run test:e2e:insecure-blocked && bun run test:e2e:clear-site-data && bun run test:e2e:fingerprints && bun run test:e2e:startup-urls && bun run test:e2e:permission-controls && bun run test:e2e:javascript-permission && bun run test:e2e:image-permission
scripts.test: bun run test:cpp && bun run test:js
